channel.title: Installation on CrySPY
channel.description: Recent content in Installation on CrySPY

item.title: CrySPY utility (optional)
item.description: Python environment in local PC Setting up Python environment in your local PC is useful to analyze CrySPY results. Utility tools (jupyter notebook and python scripts) are available for analysis and visualization. Input examples are also included in CrySPY utility. You need several Python libraries such as jupyter NumPy pandas matplotlib pymatgen Download CrySPY utility Git $ git clone https://github.com/Tomoki-YAMASHITA/CrySPY_utility.git zip Go to CrySPY utility and click green Code button, then choose Download ZIP.
